raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Legislature approved a measure to allow LA County to develop a mental health community on the Metropolitan State Hospital campus.",
    "The Metropolitan State Hospital specializes in psychiatric care and has an 826-bed capacity.",
    "The state hospital currently admits patients under four categories: incompetent to stand trial, offender with mental health disorder, not guilty by reason of insanity, and conservatorship under the Lanterman-Petris-Short Act.",
    "Los Angeles County is seeking to renovate buildings at the Metropolitan State Hospital to develop a new mental health community campus.",
    "The Los Angeles County Care Community will include facilities offering diverse treatment and housing options for people with mental health challenges.",
    "The proposal for the mental health campus responds to growing concerns over the state's mental health and homelessness crises.",
    "There is a need for more facilities and housing options for individuals with mental health challenges in California.",
    "Using state-owned underutilized land to house people with mental health needs can provide them with necessary support."
  ]
}
```
